CreateDnatRule.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md)
CreateDnatRule.ruleName: Rule name consisting of uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, and special characters -\_ /., must start with a letter, length 1-65
CreateDnatRule.publicIpAddress: Public IP address, an EIP or shared-bandwidth IP associated with the NAT gateway's dnatEips or bindEips
CreateDnatRule.protocol: Protocol; supported values: TCP, UDP, all
CreateDnatRule.publicPort: Public port (1-65535), valid when protocol is TCP or UDP; cannot be specified together with a port range
CreateDnatRule.privatePort: Private port (1-65535), valid when protocol is TCP or UDP; cannot be specified together with a port range
CreateDnatRule.publicPortRange: Public port range, e.g. "80-90", valid when protocol is TCP or UDP; cannot be specified together with a single port
CreateDnatRule.privatePortRange: Private port range, e.g. "80-90", valid when protocol is TCP or UDP; cannot be specified together with a single port
